title: Chapter 15
content:
Chapter 15: Slapping the Female Knight’s Cheek with My Erect Cock (2)

The onomatopoeia "Pechiin" that rang out was probably short for "Penis Chinchin."

"Ugh..."

The groan didn’t come from Ilia, whose cheek had been slapped, but from me.

Getting carried away, I came from my own strike.

White fluid splattered across the female knight’s face.

It was my second facial on her.

"Ugh... W-what is this?"

"Ah, um..."

"A little got in my mouth... It tastes the same as the Elixir."

W-w-w-what do I do? I got too carried away.

Yesterday Ilia had sprayed out a massive amount of semen from her asshole during her anal fountain. It would be bad if she realized that liquid and what just came out of my cock were the same. But I had already confessed to putting Elixir in her ass as treatment.

There’s no choice but to accept it.

I prostrated myself on the ground.

Before she could say anything, I just dogeza’d.

Even in another world, dogeza should have the same meaning as on Earth.

"M-Masaharu... why is Elixir coming out of your cock...? Is this really Elixir?"

"Well... even I don’t fully understand it..."

Probably because I drank so much of Dragon God Lucia’s love juice that my semen gained recovery properties too.

"Hey... Yesterday... When a large amount of Elixir came out of my... butt..."

"Ah, yes..."

"You said you put Elixir in me as treatment, right?"

"Yes..."

"Now that I think about it... Just how exactly... did you put it in...?"

"Well, rather than ’put,’ it was more like ’inserted and came’..."

This is incredibly awkward.

"S-surely not... You didn’t... put your erect... c-c... cock... into my..."

Shit!

As expected of a genius — she figured it out.

Even though she’s an otherworlder with almost no sexual knowledge, how did she reach that conclusion?!

Besides, the dying female knight was the one who mistook my erect cock for a weapon and said, "Use that weapon to pierce my vital point and kill me..."

I properly confirmed with her whether it was really okay to pierce her. She promised she wouldn’t complain later, right?

Come to think of it, Ilia swore upon the God of Light that she wouldn’t complain afterward, didn’t she?

Should I counter with that?

But that wouldn’t be honest...

I took advantage of Ilia’s misunderstanding and inserted my cock into her pretty pink asshole. Because she was on the verge of death, her asshole had zero strength and swallowed my entire length in a single thrust. Her intestinal walls clung stickily around my shaft — it felt so good that I came from just that one thrust. An abnormal amount of semen filled her intestines and pushed my cock back out...

In all the consecutive ejaculations since yesterday, the only times I came from a single stimulus were inside Dragon God Lucia’s vaginal folds and Ilia’s asshole. With aerial paizuri and handjobs, I came only after multiple stimulations. In other words, Ilia’s asshole is a supreme-grade pussy on par with a god’s vagina.

The amount of semen I released that time might have been my personal record. It would be too cruel to be hated by the owner of such a divine ass-pussy. It was still an undeveloped virgin asshole, yet it rivaled a god’s pussy. I wonder what it would become once fully trained.

Ah, shit. Just remembering yesterday is making me hard again, and my thoughts are going back into full erotic mode even though I should be reflecting.

"Sorry... I’d like to apologize properly, so could you give me some time?"

"Ah, no... You saved my life yesterday, so I should be thanking you, not receiving an apology."

"Right?!"

Ilia isn’t angry!

So I got carried away and raised my head.

I was inside Ilia’s shirt.

There was none.

*Elle manque mange.*

In my wise post-nut sage mode, the French phrase "Elle manque mange" (she is lacking) echoed in my mind. Since my amateur katakana French made it sound like "ero manko man ke," it was clear — her erotic pussy was lacking hair.

"Kyaa!"

What a cute scream. Even though she’s a female knight, she said "kyaa."

I should have immediately pulled my head out from under her shirt, but I was mesmerized by her smooth, hairless pussy and couldn’t move. Ilia had her legs closed, so her labia were neatly shut, forming a beautiful vertical slit. I wonder what it would look like if she spread her legs. Would lewd, shaped petals appear from inside?

I’m curious. But suddenly spreading her with my hands and going "kupaa" might make her angry, so I’ll hold back.

More importantly, I need to check whether she shaves or is naturally hairless. If she shaves, there should be faint stubble... I could see the hair roots if I look closely...

But while I was staring intently at her crotch, Ilia took a step back and pressed down the hem of her shirt.

Her face bright red, she glared at me. She kept opening and closing her mouth as if she wanted to say something, but no words came out.

"W..."

W?

In my clan, anyone who sees me naked must serve as a sex slave for life?

"I saw Masaharu’s cock... S-so... what I showed you... I’ll forgive it."

"Thank you."

"A-and... about my butt as well, I’ll say it again — since it was medical treatment, there’s no need for an apology. Let me thank you once more."

"Thank you!"

Ilia was breathing heavily with a bright red face.

"M-my butt... had your erect cock... inside it... Haa... haa... Uuu..."

She looks like a strong-willed woman who usually claims no interest in the opposite sex, now sexually flustered and confused.

If this were a short manga posted on social media, the next panel would probably show her going ahegao with semen dripping from her nose...
